narrative:
Center West (precinct in Noble County) has 352 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.0 percentage points.
